creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to shamaz.mazum from comment #37)

Ok, I will start testing patch again since you are giving me confidence.

My plan will be to patch llvm from ports, bump port revision [1] so we can have better logs that "proves" that patch is correctly applied.

Also, from poudriere interactive jails I will execute your program and save results toguether with rest of logs.

I will start doing builds tomorrow.

Any preference on what llvm version should I start?
I'm using llvm 18 default for about 700 pkgs that I use localy.

[1] yep, it is possible that I used a local llvm cached pkg... You program will be awesome to check this.

Cheers
